description: Mapping table that assigns a label to any live Lix row addressed by (target_entity_id, target_schema_key, target_file_id). The state foreign-key tuple is ordered as [0] target_entity_id, [1] target_schema_key, [2] target_file_id.

id.description: Stable identifier for this label assignment row.

target_entity_id.description: Target row entity_id. This is slot [0] in x-lix-state-foreign-keys and must be the canonical JSON array of string primary-key parts.

target_schema_key.description: Target row schema key. This is slot [1] in x-lix-state-foreign-keys.

target_file_id.description: Target row file scope. This is slot [2] in x-lix-state-foreign-keys; null targets global rows.

label_id.description: Label assigned to the target row. References lix_label.id.
